/usr/bin/clang++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/executionengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/diskstorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/database_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/write_ahead_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/buffer_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/fractal_bplus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/database_schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CORE_SOURCES.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o CORE_SOURCES
